title: AUTOINCREMENT problem with the INSERT xfer optimization
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, b UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, y UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT * FROM t1;
key_bug_features: AUTOINCREMENT not initialized in final INSERT for table t2
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, b UNIQUE, c TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, y UNIQUE, z REAL CHECK(z > 0));
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT a, b FROM t1 WHERE b IS NOT NULL;
